auth.setup_description: Create a strong master password to secure your vault. This is the only way to access your data.
auth.setup_warning: Note: This password cannot be recovered. Keep it safe.
auth.login_description: Enter your master password to unlock your vault and access your credentials.
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.invalid_password: Incorrect master password. Please try again.

dashboard.title: My Vault
dashboard.empty_vault_description: Start securing your digital life. Add your first credential.
dashboard.no_results_description: No credentials found matching your search.

about.description: A secure vault, crafted with love.
about.telegram_prompt: For more applications, visit my Telegram channel:

form.description: Fill in the details below. All data will be encrypted and stored securely.
form.totp_placeholder: Enter secret key from authenticator app
form.qr_success_description: The 2FA code is now set up for this entry.
form.qr_fail_description: Could not process the QR code. Make sure it is a valid TOTP QR code.
form.qr_fail_not_found: No QR code found in the image.
form.qr_import_success_description: The credential has been filled from the QR code.
form.camera_error_unavailable: Camera feature is not available on this device.
form.camera_error_denied: Camera access was denied. Please enable it in settings.
form.camera_error_generic: An error occurred while accessing the camera.
form.toast_add_description: '{{title}}' has been added to your vault.

credential.delete_confirm_description: '{{title}}' will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

generator.title: Strong Password Generator
generator.description: Create secure and unique passwords to protect your accounts.
generator.error_description: At least one character set must be selected.

backup.backup_success_description: Your encrypted backup file has been created and downloaded.
backup.restore_confirm_description: This will completely overwrite ALL of your current data with the data from the backup file. Are you sure you want to proceed?
backup.restore_success_description: Your vault has been successfully restored. The app will now reload.
backup.restore_fail_description: The backup file is invalid or corrupted. No changes were made.

share.title: Share Credential
share.description: Scan this QR code with another JeyPass app to import this credential.
share.warning_description: Only share this with people you trust. Anyone who scans this code will have full access to this credential.

customizer.title: Customize Appearance
customizer.description: Personalize the app's theme and font size to your liking.
